channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Law of the jungle — 187 replies — 748.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Law of the jungle

Open thread • Replies: 187 • Updated: 2026-06-16 20:11 UTC

OP

>I am a million billion trillionair-
>BAM BAM BAM
>STAB STAB STAB
W-WHY AM I DYING I AM RICH AND HAVE MONEY ROCKETS CARS AIEEEEEE
P-PLEASE SIRE SAVE M-
>BAM BAM BAM
NOOOO WHY IS MONEY USELESS WHY WHY WHY WAAAAH PLEASE SIR
I WILL GIVE YOU EVERYTHIN-
>STAB HIS KIDS
AAAAAAH MY KIDDIES MY BLOODLINE WHY WHY
PLEASE SIR THE TRILLION MONEY
ACK

Early replies (first 3)

62359354
>>62359336
a mentally buck busted normie is going to say """the law""" grants the rich physical immunity.... and even if it doesn't, they have like, body guards who are omnipotent, omniscient, and omnipresent. you can't do ANYTHING to the rich!!!! it's literally impossible!!!!!

62359360
>>62359336
We live in capitalism and I'm protected by the pigs u need to learn how to move nigga

62359387
>nigger tier envy thread
>/biz/

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62373377
>>62371463
Slave mentality. If you are not born upper class you'll never be more than a piece of cattle to them. To be extracted, abused, slaughtered, and thrown onto the rubbish pile of the forgotten.
The only way to regain your honour and dignity is by fighting them to the death and replacing their ranks entirely with your own.
They like to claim that they in their positions because they're smarter and more capable. They are not. They are more ruthless, more violent and that's all it ever was!

62373388
We have nothing to lose but our chains! What do we have else? Our lives? Life will pass before you know it, make it count you cowards!

62373610
class cucks went real quiet

62373692
>>62365676
>lectures about being a sociopath for buying and selling stuff
>unironically aspires to murder strangers in cold blood out of envy
your brain on communism

62373696
>>62373692
welcome to the real world, pussy
Those "strangers" are vampires drunk on my blood and the blood of my brothers and my ancestors

62373718
>>62373696
Nothing "real world" about uttering two antithetical ideas in the same breath. It also doesn't make you tough. Just retarded.

62373727
>>62373718
I hope you know what happens to class traitors :)

62373746
>>62373727
>whining on 4chan since 2007
>but now his depressed drunken tough talk is totez 4 realz
you won't do shit

62373751
>>62373746
and you're too pussy to even talk shit about your masters

62373760
i suddenly feel very horny

62373773
>>62373751
>toothless impotent rage makes me a badass!
kek

62374025
>>62373773
>being le stoic cuck makes me better

62374136
>>62359336
what are you saying? That the entire 2 trillion value of SpaceX is based on one man who is vulnerable to any number of Luigis and it would be pretty foolish to invest with that level of risk?

62374949
>>62370324
>revolutionary
I see you still haven't responded to >>62368447
NYPA, nigger.

62374958
>>62371364
he's only here to sow dissent. is either
a) paid shill
b) tranny
c) on antidepressants
d) vaxxed
or some combination.
>>62371449
take your meds.

62374966
>>62373377
>>62373388
>>62373610
this board is dead you idiot.
go jump off a bridge so we can use that as the signal for le ebin revolution.

62374996
>>62373718
>Nothing "real world" about uttering two antithetical ideas in the same breath.
the real world is rife with contradiction and inconsistency. just look at this thread. you have poor retard manual laborers swearing allegiance to a system that is strangling what's left of the middle class to death.

62375795
>>62374996
What i meant is that the simultaneously held antitheses are not and cannot be accurately reflective of any real world property or state. I didn't mean to imply that people or societies are consistent. Communist retards have been the ultimate exemplars refuting that assertion for a hundred years.

62375879
>>62359400
>half a dozen fags with glocks
Bodyguard this

62375918
>>62359479
>rothschild way more sympathic

62375922
>>62359403
Yes. In the forest the strong dominates.

62376058
>>62374949
I have nothing to say to you, it's known where you stand

62376070
>>62374966
Capital must be delighted so many dumb brainwashed fucks like you roam the earth
You're not upper class, faggot, you're a worthless slave like I am

62376327
>>62376070
>>62376058
>nooo you have to be a rebel!
lmao

62376332
>>62376070
>you're not upper class
where did I say I was?
Unlike you, I am not compelled to "have it all" by propaganda

62376571
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AFzu_w7d9W0
Bothered to make a singable english version of one of my fav communist songs
Be thankful maggots

Anyway:

Brothers, we reach for the rifles
Into the decisive fight
Why should the workers still trifle?
Why fear the specter of might?
Why should the workers still trifle?
Why fear the specter of might?
Break these old frozen cold slave chains!
World set ablaze in red flames
To Break all chains that is our true plight
Brothers are lost, without light
We free ourselves from this slavery
Clench our armed fists for the strike
So that it may on our slavers
Strike as a thunderstorm might
To them we are docile, just cattle
To us that appeared to be fate
We reject fate through the final battle
Drones, rifles, bombs, all our hate
Rise to bring down all the tyrants
Fight to the death, our new fate!
Conquer the world for our children
Build a free socialist state!

62376741
"Whatever it takes to switch places with the busters on top
I'm bustin' shots, make the world stop"
-2pac

Fuck all you'll cowards, I saw some pathetic fuck hating on communism in a now deleted thread just earlier because he worked oh so hard for... 70k!!!! LOL!!!! you're nothing pal, a slave, trash, garbage, I wipe my ass with your net worth. Faggot
I want the fucking casino, the consolation prize isn't enough

62377076
>>62376332
I really do wonder what the fuck is going on with these obnoxious raids the last few years.
Congratulations: you came in to a dead community and shit it up even harder by spewing provably retarded nonsense
WEEEEEEEEEEE INNANETS (that wouldn't exist at all under forced collectivism)

These are also curiously the only threads that don't get pruned despite being WILDLY off topic

62377094
>>62376332
I'm not compelled by propaganda, but by own disposition. The same mentality that got the ruling class to acquire their position in the first place.

62377115
And then you eat him?

item.title: I talked to two people today about rent. — 128 replies — 512.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
I talked to two people today about rent.

Open thread • Replies: 128 • Updated: 2026-06-16 20:22 UTC

OP

I talked to two people today about rent.

The first guy said he lives in Atlanta and pays about $2,300 a month in rent. I mentioned that works out to roughly $27,600 a year, which I personally think is a lot for rent. He also told me he was let go from a sales job at a small company about two weeks ago. Small company = low pay. When I commented on the rent being high, he responded by saying, “maybe it is a lot for you.”

I told him it is a terrible financial decision.
I also told him that I live in a major city and my monthly taxes alone are more than that.

Later, I spoke with another guy who pays around $2,000 a month for a luxury apartment. That’s about $24,000 a year. I didn’t ask about his income or job situation, but I shared that I thought the annual rent cost seemed very high.

I kept telling him his rent was a waste of money and he should buy a house. He told me he might not want to to live somewhere for so long. I asked him how he expected to build wealth. The conversation went back and forth with me saying it was a waste of “money down the drain.” He eventually admitted it was hard and bad use of money and insulted me with “life is hard when YOU don’t live in mommies basement.”
Wow.
He is literally throwing money down the drain and I trying to give me good advice.

It made me wonder if people commonly spend over $20,000–$30,000 a year on rent? And if so, how common is that relative to income and lifestyle choices?

Please look at picrel. Do people spend so much of their paycheque on rent? How does anyone become rich?

Curious what others think about this.

Early replies (first 3)

62372611
>>62372604
>I talked to two people today about rent.
no you didn't

62372621
>$24k per year rent is throwing money down the drain
>$50k per year interest payments for 30 years to "own" the same thing is building wealth

Lol

Lmao

62372624
>>62372604

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62373586
>>62373568
It ISNT a no brainer anymore.
That’s where the k shaped economy comes in. Owning a house comfortably in the top 10% means the bottom 90% are already far behind and falling farther behind each quarter.

62373589
>>62373581
?
I take my gaming seriously since the game is competitive and ranked and fun.
I am locked in each evening.

62373592
>>62373571
Once again, wealth gap. 2026 is fucking crazy.
Dollar down, stocks up. But people have no ownership of anything. Wasn’t “own nothing and be happy” part of agenda 2030?

62373594
>>62373102
>>62373589
arguing with poor brokies is locking in.
really?

62373595
>>62373566
You go outside to let the bull in.

62373597
Daily autistic browncel thread

62373598
>>62373594
I ain’t arguing in a game, wtf are you talking about?

62373600
>>62373595
you're a worthless piece of shit and people here are tired of you

62373604
>>62373594
That post was at 10pm…
My conversations today were around 3pm. What the fuck are you on?
Discuss topic in op or fuck off.

62373607
>>62373600
Ok, just don’t keep the bull waiting.

62373616
>>62373598
you were arguing on /biz/, then off playing a match?
did that not happen?
>>62373607
that post was for me what are you doing?

62373618
Good thread op.

62373626
>>62373618
samefag fail

you never seem to figure out ID's

we can see how many times you respond to yourself.

62373639
>>62373626
/thread

62373643
>>62373616
I wasn’t arguing on /biz/. I was discussing business and finance with other anons. Why are you here?

62373726
OP is a fat retard who probably stinks to high hell

62373757
>>62373618
lol what a humiliating samefag

62373789
>>62372604
>Average American home requires an income over $200k a year
Grim

62373858
>>62373789
To live away from certain “people,” yeah.

62374484
>>62372611
this thread was posted by a mentally ill discord tranny who previously nameniggered as OCPD. he posts this crap 12+ hour a day, every day. he frequently uses the leto furfag residential VPN shitposting front end to change IDs and reply to his own posts.

62374504
>>62373618
oh man lol. Why are you posting these almost every day? You sound insufferable. Go back.

62374657
>>62372621
What? My whole mortage is only 15k per year

62374661
>>62372604
It's very common for people to be rentslaves or house-poor their entire lives because they've been psyop shamed into avoiding living with their own family.

62376556
>>62372604
When you really think about it, home owners are losing a lot of money too. First there's the down payment, that money grows a lot faster in stocks. In some cases it may be worth more than the entire value of the house in 30 years. Housing simply can't compete with the gains from the stock market. Secondly, even if you own your home and it's a 600k asset. Living in it, is throwing money away. If you sold you could be making 60k a year from your investments. Renting for 30k a year would be a net gain.

Home owners are mostly idiots, unless they are landlords or rich and retired. It is the handicap that prevents high earners from ever making it.

62376833
>>62372604
It depends on the market of course but yeah $2300 is not high in most places these days. If you equate that to a house payment that is under $300k which in major metros is ghetto tier housing. There is nothing inherently wrong with renting from a financial standpoint, even Dave Ramsey would agree. If you are not planning to stay put for 5-10 years then you are better off renting. The transaction costs for home ownership are quite high, often 10% of the price. The most important factor is, as your picrel states, the percentage of your income you spend on housing. If you want to invest and get rich, stay under 25% of your take-home.

62376850
>>62372621
24k X infinite is more than 50k

62376855
>>62376556
Yep, people forget how much it costs to keep a home maintained. On top of taxes, interest and insurance, most houses require 1-2% of their value spent on maintenance every year. No mutual funds ever needed a new AC unit or roof.

62376874
>>62372604
Whether you are paying rent or interest, you are throwing the money away. At least with renting someone else is taking all the capital depreciation and liability risk.

62377090
>>62372604
did a retard write this shit? do you really not know the reason why people rent over buying A FUCKING HOUSE???

62377165
>>62372604
This chart is bogus. I make $80,000 a year and bought a house for $300,000 back in 2024. My monthly take home is no where near $10,000

item.title: > Our system is designed to concentrate wealth and keep the majority of workers on the brink of bankruptcy. — 21 replies — 84.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
> Our system is designed to concentrate wealth and keep the majority of workers on the brink of bankruptcy.

Open thread • Replies: 21 • Updated: 2026-06-16 20:22 UTC

OP

> Our system is designed to concentrate wealth and keep the majority of workers on the brink of bankruptcy.

I hate poor people so much.
Here is reply there:
> If I had no income for eight weeks, l'd end up homeless. There's no recovery from that for me.

People like THAT are people that seethe at the rich.
People with low income and IQ and 0 savings.
The underclass.

Early replies (first 3)

62376589
Hello OPCD
Ready for powerposting again?

62376633
>>62376579
Are redditors that ignorant?

62376657
>>62376579
he's right and you're delusional and kind of a freak tbqh

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62376721
This is true.

62376744
>>62376579
neither of my parents had college degrees and I started from -30k in student loans now after working for 8 years I could live for 10 years without income these ppl are stupid lol

62376770
>>62376744
I especially love the threads where poor people discuss what the rich should do with their money. kek.

62376771
>>62376579
Keep it up comrade, you are our most effective class fighter. Every day more and more workers decide to reject any kind of compromise with your kind!

62376785
it's literally true
the "system" (the government) can give everyone a million dollars if it so desires. but this will achieve nothing. what the system needs is cogs turning, and that means people have to be forced to work. it chose to do that in the manner described in the oppic
soviets just forced everyone to stay employed, but as the result most people didn't pull their weight and the economy collapsed

62376792
So many redditors itt T_T

62376802
>>62376792
Damn these redditors must have balls of steel

62376844
>>62376657
The system is designed to make you want to be poor.

>didn't move out of the house at 18 and take out massive loans to fund your bachelor lifestyle? sorry no chance at pussy for you
>didn't lease or finance a new expensive car with a german badge? sorry no chance at pussy for you
>didn't spend all your money hitting up clubs and paying for expensive drinks? sorry no chance at pussy for you
>didn't take out a 30 year mortgage to buy a house that you can't afford? sorry no chance at pussy for you

The pressure to stay poor just keeps ramping up as you get older.

62376864
>>62376844
yeah its so obvious and then you notice how a car is basically a requirement in this country and how expensive they are to buy, maintain, insurance, registration..

and how the entire country is built only for cars u cant even walk places and the public transit is awful

62376872
>>62376864
Everything is a requirement in this country unless you're a 10/10 in looks, otherwise you're just a slave and a wallet for women.

62376897
>>62376844
> >didn't move out of the house at 18 and take out massive loans to fund your bachelor lifestyle? sorry no chance at pussy for you
You only say this but indirectly admit/noticed 90% of boys don’t get laid under 20 and only if they betabuck provider after 20 lol.

62376998
>>62376579
Kek this is what commies actually believe

62377016
Two things can be true at the same time.

I'm a wagie at an auction house (like an amazon warehouse serf but in a fancier place). Lots of my colleagues are permabroke. Just overspending on frivolous shit, not even setting aside 50$ a month to build an emergency fund. No financial discipline.

But I also see a ton of nepotism at the top, people getting high paid jobs just cause they have connections, the leaders of the company wining and dining politicians to get favors; the fact that you pay fewer fees the more expensive an item you buy (or sell) is. Ofc it makes financial sense for the company to try and attract wealthy customers (and to give them discounts etc).

Maybe "designed" is the wrong term but the "system" is certainly working in a way that facilitates wealth accumulation at the top. Always has been, but I think with today's global world these mechanisms get supercharged.

If you lived in a small hamlet and there's one crafty merchant getting richer and richer while the hoi polloi starve, eventually the mob will come after him with their pitchforks. But in a global interconnected world the great unwashed basically have zero recourse, votes can be bought, opinions swayed, and the economy is way too complex for an average joe to really even discern just who it is he's getting fucked by.

62377021
>>62376579
this is a good thing

62377053
>>62377016
>But in a global interconnected world the great unwashed basically have zero recourse

Consider that maybe the problem is that the great unwashed actually love the system. They will actually fight to protect the system if you try to dismantle it because they would rather have more crumbs than their neighbour than be living with equal riches.

COVID should have been a wakeup call for you as to what the majority of people actually want and believe in.

62377116
ITT: basement dwelling retards with 0 expenses can't understand why some people would be struggling after 2 months of no income.
Before some broke NEET larpers reply to me: I've got over 500k in liquid investments and live on my own, but I still have sympathy for people who don't exist solely because their parents take care of them like most of the manchildren on this board.

62377129
>>62377053
Yeah look at the fags on /biz/ stroking themselves over their 100k portfolio defending capitalism with their lives.

62377161
>>62377053
true, and all too human.

i think if and when AI hits its technological singularity stage we'll all be fucked because it will manipulate even the most discerning, 160IQ gigabrained eggheads with great ease. the nuclear annihilation scenario of the Terminator movies always seemed laughable to me. if AI hits singularity it will be able to influence us some goober placing npcs in their the Sims village. whether acting on its own behalf or to do the bidding of whoever controls it, we'll all be as rats in a skinner box

item.title: Investing in Sex Robots & Aritifical Womb Technology — 12 replies — 48.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Investing in Sex Robots & Aritifical Womb Technology

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-06-16 20:22 UTC

OP

This will be one of the greatest investment opportunities in our lifetime within another decade or so.

Tech is stagnating, just as every other industry is out of viable optimization methodologies. There is nothing new being created, every niche is saturated and optimized. AI will produce some value but it is ultimately a giant bubble that will never, and I mean never advance to the point of consciousness or intelligence (unless they use biological brains and do so correctly - they will fail). Science doesn't even know where consciousness comes.

That being said: sex robots and eventual artificial womb tech (much easier than actually creating consciousness) will be the big new technology that solves real world problems. And the funny thing is: tech companies will eventually run out of other means of generating increasing revenue and will essentially HAVE to go this route, just like they're currently doing with AI. They have nothing else. This technology will have vast and continuous demand as it will entirely replace the old/current paradigm.

Early replies (first 3)

62375864
>>62375553
I want sexbots to be real so bad

62375914
>>62375864
same
all the despair, pain and unhappiness i feel... if it was a good sexbot i would be happy.
the thing is, the first sexbots will be bad. like truly awful. probably not physically dangerous... maybe. but not enjoyable. like how electric masturbators are really good at making me nut, but a soulless experience that leaves me feeling empty. the technology to replace a living organism with a robot is just not there.
if it were viable, there would be news. most people who are lonely and horny want the sexbot. but porn and masturbators are the best we have. sexbots are an AI complete problem.

62375977
>>62375553
>sex robots and eventual artificial womb tech (much easier than actually creating consciousness)
AI is not about creating consciousness. you are retarded if you think intelligence requires consciousness.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62376084
>>62375977
"AI" is just a number of algos operating within a matrix of data to produce output similar to some complex bot. AI is NOT intelligent, it is a pseudo-thinking automation.
>When faced with novel scenarios that deviate from training patterns (e.g., a simple detour in a known city map), these systems often fail spectacularly, revealing they lack a coherent mental model of reality.
consciousness, or something tantamount to it, is the only thing that can transform AI from rote, confined calculation machines into actual thinking machines. Scientists will never be able to replicate this.

62376404
>>62375553
Fetuses grown in artificial wombs will be stunted in ways we won't fully appreciate until they're born. They won't hear their mother's voice or her heartbeat. They won't hear their father's voice, either. They won't hear anyone. Only the click and whine of machines, the droning gurgle of synthetic embryonic fluids. Grown like lab rats by scientists that see them as a commodity. I shudder at the thought.
>entire crops were lost

62376422
>>62376404
Sorry, did I say born? I mean dispensed

62376501
>>62375553
Nah just give me ai glasses that tell you if a girl is interested so we can stop this annoying boomer "read the room" nonsense. That's all I ask. Would save us all a lot of time and embarrassment too.

62376962
>>62376404
An artificial womb could be an improvement over women in the end. Imagine having the best genes for you selected.

62377004
>>62376501
bro just remove the middle man get one of those smartphone hypnosis app instead.

62377063
>>62376404
This. I just had my son 2 years ago and it is sickening to imagine him being robbed of skin to skin connection (Google it), breastfeeding over formula (Google it too), and god knows what else dopamine and serotonin he's been getting through kisses and cuddles. Such children would be riddled with mental illness and allergies as a minimum.

62377134
>>62375553
I will not put my penis into that thing

62377166
>>62375553
daaad, why did you think it was a good idea to clone me when you're a schizo permavirgin?

item.title: UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1 — 37 replies — 43.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1

Open thread • Replies: 37 • Updated: 2026-06-16 19:31 UTC

OP

Brothers,

SpaceX has begun to rise. Its success or fall is of little importance to us in the short term.

In the meanwhile we must devise ways to gain a spot at the table with our kin in the six figure club.

I for one propose we spend our time learning a subject. Knowledge is the greatest wealth of all.

However, I would be remiss to not tell the truth that I haven't a clue what we should study.

So instead I suggest we create an eggregore for these threads. Others made monero-chan, bobo and sminem

I am thinking we create one based on a girl who would be willing to believe in us while we are poor and brave the pain throughout having to witness our more disappointing moments of action. Never losing faith in us, she is always there. Yes. This is how we shall spend our time.

At any rate, that is my suggestion for tonight's fun. I have to work in the morning so let's not get too rowdy. Take it or leave it. If you will take it, then be sure to double it and pass it on to the next anon.

Let us commence the general!

Come one, come all!

Early replies (first 3)

62373772
>>62373752
Jannies will surely delete these threads. Instead of creating an eggregore why not try something new and usurp an old one. It may be a derivative of one which has already been made.

62373798
>>62373772
Hello anon thanks for joining. You are poster #1. Your anime image shall be the eggregore. The "coffee" in the image is rather a good omen. We all know images with hot girls accompanied by a brief post on coffee attracts all the attention.

Now that matter is settled, help me add some links to this post here. This will be the header for the start of each general

Helpful links

>Educational materials
https://w9.kaijimanga.com/

>Looking to try the TCG route?
https://youtube.com/@alphainvestments69?si=tDAPjnRSZhyCIGP5

>Lost all hope?
https://www.indeed.com/


>Hidden in plain sight
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Limitless_(film)

>Games to strengthen you financial acumen
https://mahjongsoul.yo-star.com/

>Learn your from your betters
https://ia600609.us.archive.org/3/items/the-house-of-rothschild-ferguson-niall/The%20House%20of%20Rothschild%20-%20Ferguson%2C%20Niall.pdf
What is the name of that character in your post?

62373799
>>62373772
verily, a true fact

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62373864
>>62373838
Funny, I'm 27. A 20 year gap. Wouldn't mind being 17 again.

62373866
>>62373803
Posting animu has been a very effective method to gatekeep and single out posters which do not belong. You need to go back.
>>62373798
I wanted to propose pic related. Her name's in the filename and is practically a dead meme from an era long past. We already have pink wojaks so there's already some cross pollination plus there's a good chunk of her content being collected in a booru.

62373871
>>62373866
Okay, bro. Go gatekeep /reddit

62373881
>>62373752
I made the six figure club with stocks and crypto. Lost most of it. Now I’m trying to make it again and more with just stocks after a long hiatus. I realized I’ve been over diversifying. Growing a small account fast will require fewer but larger bets. And patience for a good entry.

62373888
>>62373866
Okay
First order of business settled.

Next order of business.

$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$

Let's brainstorm. I think we should find something to learn. This thing can't be too mainstream, can't be too complex for our brains, and must be fun enough to encourage people to come back to these threads. We shall do this [subject] for x amount of threads and if NOTHING substantial comes from it, we move on to a new [subject]

62373902
>>62373888
I've seen a couple of drawfags post on /biz/ with a pressing question about how to monetize their art. What I'm about to suggest will definitely delete these threads because it involves a venture which for whatever reason jannies/mods will see it as "advertising" some personal project. If you're serious about starting a fun /biz/ related hobby we should brainstorm elsewhere without interference.

62373918
>>62373902
Will you stop crying about jannies??????

I will go ahead and do the brainstorming since you're terrified of the meek. Your cowardice is really annoying. Like you're begging them to delete it, first post in this thread and it's you putting ideas into the heads of jannies.

Give me one moment while I gather my thoughts, it might take a few minutes as I'd like to lay out multiple ventures that will appeal to a wide amount of sensibilities and then we will converge on one.

62373951
I have to wage in the morning.
It's too much to ask for this thread to last until then.
So for now, we have accomplished one thing.

I shall go to bed and tomorrow we will begin discussing various money making opportunities. I will try to put myself into as many different shoes as I can. Can millions be made? Unlikely. Can $1 be made? VERY likely. Goodnight anons.

62373961
>>62373951
Yeah it's about that time for me too, but I still think we should really start a group elsewhere.

62374042
>>62373866
>>62373881
>>62373888
>>62373918
>>62373951
>>62373961

Kys’selves anime fags

62374054
>>62373752
>devise ways to gain a spot at the table
DCA crypto. It's literally your only hope. Good luck.

62374086
>>62373752
>In the meanwhile we must devise ways to gain a spot at the table with our kin in the six figure club.
I'm in the six figure club. Six figure salary, six figure portfolio. There is no six figure club, six figures isn't enough to do anything, your life doesn't change. You still have to wageslave like any other poorfag.

62374140
We buy and hold sealed Pokémon card booster boxes

62374144
>>62373866
>Posting animu has been a very effective method to gatekeep
True!

>>62373881
I came to a similar realization, being diversified just isn't going to help me get rich fast. I need less plays and they need to succeed well.

62374193
>>62373752
what stocks are we buying

62374471
>>62373752
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

62374533
anyone wants to learn about photonics? some stocks in that area have gone ballistic, i'm talking 10000% returns in 4 years

62374614
>>62373752
$8k nw fag reporting in

I bought spacex at ATH so I'm doing to 3-fig nw pretty soon wish me luck

62374764
>>62374614
whats the thinking process behing going all in in spcx? i am just curious

62374781
>>62373752
Based /x/ anon, keep fighting the good fight, and if you get something going please fucking pump my Cheese bags.

62374835
>4 figure club thread
>half the posts are animeposters
Many such cases

62374867
>>62373798
Mah nigga this is just Gabriel-chan. She's a neet that didn't do shit about her angelic job, her demon friends started helping her out. Yes, she will be a perfect base for our mascot.

62374886
>>62373888
Based trips.

>Next order of business.
>$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$

The way i see it, you guys need to learn how to DCA. That is easy, just buy whatever you want on monthly basis. The thing that we need to understand is: which ones to buy? Well I find that /smg/ threads are great for that.

>But we're poorfags who cant even invest 100 bucks on something
Yea, me too son, me too

62375712
>>62373752
how to make money as a poorfag /biz/raeli guide:
>prolific ai shit. bery klaustrophian
>work a wage job
>lie cheat and steal; have no remorse about it
>a penny saved is a penny earned. literally.
>unlearn your poorfag tendencies and your scarcity mindset trauma
>steal from homeless people
>street busking on off days
put everything on the stock market. fuck crypto.
>don't cheap out on food though. good nutrition makes for better decisions
>if ur on meds, start selling them
>dont be an autist who views the law as an unbreakable fact of life.
>get into options trading if you can. read the options playbook
>stfu about your money adventures
>SHUT THE FUCK UP ABOUT MONEY
>DO NOT TELL ANY1 IRL ABOUT WHAT YOU'RE DOING

62375724
>>62374533
QUBT,RGTI,IONQ

i had cheap entry prices but sold too early. now i want to kill myself

62376678
Bump, will be off work soon

62376699
>>62373803

62376812
>>62376678

62376829

item.title: POOMP YOU'RE MISSING OUT WE'RE ALL GETTING RICH — 36 replies — 23.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
POOMP YOU'RE MISSING OUT WE'RE ALL GETTING RICH

Open thread • Replies: 36 • Updated: 2026-06-16 18:51 UTC

OP

POOMP
YOU'RE MISSING OUT
WE'RE ALL GETTING RICH

Early replies (first 3)

62372990
wow their revenue is going to 200x. you would have to be a retard not to buy calls

62372997
>>62372988
lol, this is their entire plan to remove wealth from the public before the end of the world? I don't think so. SPCX isn't even worth the current price. Go look at what they did on the futures markets. SPCX has already been listed for markets as a futures contract asset and its chart completely dumped from 2,200 to 160.

62373002
The man who owns the company saying its going to go up!? OMG BUY LADS

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62373067
>CEO: i think my company is worth infinity dollarydoos
>investors: HOLY FUCK BUY NOW

goyim are retards who should be enslaved

62373068
>>62372988
if a singular company doing mostly meaningless economic activity is able to actually create $1T revenue in a singular business year around 2030;
simply imagine how much trillions of revenue essential economical endeavors must be making within the same time period. (probably quire a lot)

now hypothetically try to extrapolate from this the amount of outstanding currency/debt/credit roaming around the economy directly and how high asset prices would be, which are nearly 100% of the time are prone to derive their value from the total outstanding currency/debt/credit.

one would come to the conclusion that this would mean there is mind boggling, reality bending inflation in both currency/debt/credit AND THEREFORE consumer prices and asset prices ahead.

now remember how well you were faring with actual inflation in the past.

yeah.

good luck.

62373084
>>62373067
none of the investors believe this, they all just think that they can time the market and sell thier garbage to a more credulous retard

62373086
>>62373068
>reddit spacing
i bet you said the same about tesla

62373112
>>62373086
you seem confused.

perhaps you are confusing stock price/market cap and revenue.

62373124
>>62372988
this sort of bullshit on social media should be illegal to say by the owner of the company. blatant price manipulation.

62373142
You're laughing now. You won't be laughing in 2030 when Tyrone and Rajesh fly to Mars on US debt.

62373147
>>62373124
It is illegal, but the current admin won’t prosecute it.

62373152
>>62372988
Im less poor than I was yesterday
Thanks Elon

62373154
>>62373112
i trust Elon over some random doom poster

62373176
>>62373154
Because you are castrated goyim

62373183
>>62373176
Youre just seething because you didn't buy the IPO and are Sidelined for the golden bull run (again)

62373215
>>62373008
None of this happened. I'm talking about SPCX futures being listed on Coinbase months before this cattle IPO launch and hype. So now that SPCX IPO'ed, what does Coinbase do? They hide the previous futures chart to reflect the current IPO stock on the futures chart when the fucking futures chart showed they started at 2,200 in liquid contracts to than just dump to 160. Thats why the IPO was at 160. Its a giant fucking scam. Elon's personal piggy bank.

62373236
so where is the money gonna flow when the rugging starts? i already took out my initial gamble play now im just riding house money, all in DRAM again?

62373255
>>62373004
The word you're looking for is "amass" you esl dipshit. remove yourself from my board NOW

62373272
>>62373255

62373345

62373347
>>62372988
WAGMI!!!!! :D

62373379
>>62373183
I’m mad, that’s for sure
I think mostly sad, none of this stuff pops off when i have money to gamble

62373386
>>62373215
that anon u r replying to explained it to you . if u shorted the coinbase futures 1 millisecond before it changed to the actual IPO price nothing would have changed in your account for p&l , it is a rebase not a revaluation

62373403
>>62373386

62374320

>>62373236

item.title: I have a close to zero work WFH job and few meetings today but I spent a lot of it mourning my loserdom and ugliness. — 3 replies — 12.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
I have a close to zero work WFH job and few meetings today but I spent a lot of it mourning my loserdom and ugliness.

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-06-16 20:18 UTC

OP

I have a close to zero work WFH job and few meetings today but I spent a lot of it mourning my loserdom and ugliness.

Never had a gf, never even been on a date. And I'm in my 30s.

Never been in an environment I belonged in. Zero friends after school, even after going to university for 4 years.

And at every stage of my life, people want me to fail. If a process isn't 1 million percent objective, people will judge me harshly. I have never been in an environment that suited me. I was smarter than everyone at my regular comprehensive school. I resent having been in that environment. I went to my nearby university and did a subject I hated and was surrounded by normies that saw me as disgusting. When I was in person in office jobs, I never socialised with normies even once.

I have zero chance of ever getting a gf or friends. I live in Britain, which is a disgusting authoritarian backwater.

My job is a deadend and moving to a shitty London flat to gamble on advancing my career is a humiliation ritual too far. My taxes are going towards disgusting proles and third worlders and people with fake disabilities.

Early replies (first 3)

62377085
>>62377066
didnt u make this exact thread 3 days ago

62377120
>>62377066
kill yourself retard nobody cares, unironically kill yourself faggot
>in all fields

62377149
>>62377066
Women are spawn of satan, you don't realize all the bullets you dodged. Unironically. but you can't leave that mindset

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: >after 15 months of monk mode, you finally talk to a woman, at a cafe you regularly attend, just like Claude advised you… — 5 replies — 3.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>after 15 months of monk mode, you finally talk to a woman, at a cafe you regularly attend, just like Claude advised you…

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-06-16 18:42 UTC

OP

>after 15 months of monk mode, you finally talk to a woman, at a cafe you regularly attend, just like Claude advised you
>"Umm, WHY did you start talking to me?! Do I even know you? Is this a YouTube prank or something? *holds up her phone and takes a picture of you and the snap sound is extremely loud* This one's going on my LinkedIn Overcoming Adversity by Rejecting Creeps Pinterest board!"
>You open your mouth to say something but she interrupts
>"Ohmigod, Tessica, Vaporeon, come quick, this ugly creep is trying to talk to me like those Andrew Tate TikTok videos!! Awww, he think's he's a big Alpha Chad for trying to scare girls into sex slavery!!"
>they burst out laughing and take multiple videos and pictures of you within ten seconds, to better train the AI
>her other friend has already asked the cashier for a "Squidgy Marshmallow Latte" (code for "call the police, a rape is ongoing")
>your trial is televised and the barrister's questioning of you becomes an international meme that culminates in a new form of brain rot and an indie horror movie adaptation that grosses $600 million worldwide
>you aren't sent to jail but your likeness is put into all AI threat scanning technology and a small set of numbers buried within every AI weight bars you from all employment and banking for the rest of your life

Early replies (first 3)

62374396
who the fuck is claude?

62374419
>>62374390
You joke but it’s fucking impossible to tell which women want you to approach them and which don’t, making cold approach a pain in the ass. And i get women who don’t like it, i find phone and street sellers annoying as fuck also. Tinder seems like so much easier option, or approaching women at clubs.

62374434
Wise money takes candid photos of them without approaching, and generates AI porn later. You got greedy.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62376482
>>62374434
>go up to a woman
>take multiple pictures of her point blank
>"WHAT THE HELL?!!?!!"
>walk away and go home
>Have AI create a fully animated POV sex scene
>have a custom API make it so the pelvic thrusts automatically sync up with your mechanized masturbator sex toy molded to your cock specifically
>put on VR goggles
>*nut*
>rinse and repeat with basically any woman ever
Kinda crazy how dystopian that sounds given that it's not just possible, but every guy with a computer and more than two brain cells can do it.
Flying cars they said.

62376585
>>62374390
why the hell would i regularly attend a cafe?

item.title: "He didn't buy SPCX" edition >Educational sites: >Financial TV Streams: >Charts: >Screeners: >Gambling: >Pre-Market and… — 85 replies — 67.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
"He didn't buy SPCX" edition >Educational sites: >Financial TV Streams: >Charts: >Screeners: >Gambling: >Pre-Market and…

Open thread • Replies: 85 • Updated: 2026-06-16 19:07 UTC

OP

"He didn't buy SPCX" edition

>Educational sites:
https://www.investopedia.com

>Financial TV Streams:
https://www.newslive.com/american/cnbc.html
https://www.livestreamy.net/bloomberg/

>Charts:
https://www.tradingview.com
https://www.finscreener.com
https://www.portfoliovisualizer.com

>Screeners:
https://finviz.com/
https://etfdb.com/

>Gambling:
https://www.optionsplaybook.com/options-introduction/
https://www.optionsprofitcalculator.com
https://optionstrat.com/
https://www.optionistics.com/quotes/option-prices

>Pre-Market and Live data:
https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures
https://finance.yahoo.com/

>Calendars:
https://www.marketwatch.com/economy-politics/calendar
https://www.earningswhispers.com/calendar
https://www.cmegroup.com/trading/interest-rates/countdown-to-fomc.html
https://www.mortgagenewsdaily.com/data/building-permits

>Boomer Investing 101:
https://www.bogleheads.org/wiki/Getting_started
https://www.sec.gov/search-filings

>Misc:
https://www.financialjuice.com/home
https://finance.yahoo.com/trending-tickers
https://market24hclock.com/
https://www.dividendchannel.com/drip-returns-calculator
https://brokerchooser.com/
https://www.chathamfinancial.com/technology/us-market-rates

>Previous >>62372298

Early replies (first 3)

62373348

>should've bought more than one SPCX edition
thank you for your attention to this matter

62373354
>>62373348

62373362

62375544

62375550

these are all great entries and might go lower even

>>62375107
>he didn’t buy when it was sub-200
this is why retards never make money here. you faggots are either too reckless or too pussy-footed

62375595

62375597

62375690
>>62375107
Good. Somebody needs to buy my bags one day. Stay out.

62375745
algos arent letting anything run today
if somethign significant supposed to be happening or is it just warch fears, which are supposed to be tomorrow

62375758
Nobody is making money off of these oil prices. The only guy making any money off of the changes in price of oil is Baron Trump boss.

62375764
>>62375685
All my shares in SPCX are IPO at $135 and my KMB is at $98.

62375767
>>62375595
Are you talking about SpaceX? Because it more than any other can exactly do that.
This is exactly what the 4% floating is designed for.
This 4% was only 75B at its IPO. You only need to pump that to suddenly make the other remaining 96% pump by as much in %, and thus get le meme multi-trillion valuation and turn it into gazillion valuation.
It's all fucking FAKE and GAY.

62375800
LOL

62375814
>>62375767
>only 75B
what do you mean only?
that's like 10 gamestops, I agree with anon, if retail could gamma squeeze $75b of equities then half of the russel would be squeezing daily

62375840
>>62375800
>June 15th
tweet doesn't exist
https://xcancel.com/AP

62375897
everything is on a uptrend despite the algo interference

62375982
>>62375897
ok i guess i meant just SPCX LOL

62376054
fuck tech and fuck AI, pls keep poisoning the market space bros
t. tech worker

62376066
>>62376054
>he doesn't know spacex is an AI company

62376076
>>62376066
in space tho so it's cooler

62376311
i think that Greenshoe Option is fucking with the nav

62376602
>>62373337
I only managed to snag £5700 worth of shares our of £20k.
Still, better than a kick up the arse.

62376628
Most retail couldn't get shares anyway.

62376667
I'm about to buy 44,000 dollars worth of shares but am scared. Convince me to do it.

62376709
>>62376667
do it bro dont be a pussy youre gonna miss out

item.title: What made you still hold BTC? — 25 replies — 18.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
What made you still hold BTC?

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-06-16 18:59 UTC

OP

Bitcoin has gone through multiple cycles, crashes, and endless criticism, yet many continue to hold. What keeps your conviction strong after all these years?

Early replies (first 3)

62371733
>>62371718
>What keeps your conviction strong after all these years?

62371807
The only reason to ever sell bitcoin is to buy more at a lower price.

62371917
>>62371807
correct
>waiting for a good entry

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62372043
If you look at the last 5 years, half of the time BTC was higher than it is now.

The Nasdaq only goes up and is 2x since 5 years.

BTC won't explode 10x from here, if you're in crypto you want huge gains. We're gambling. BTC is boring and you don't even have a good reason for why it will outperform an NFT. It certainly has 30x the risk.

62372051
>>62372043
I wanted to say an ETF, but yeah I also don't know if it will outperform bored apes desu.

If you buy crypto, gamble properly.
If you don't want to gamble, buy an ETF.

62372056
>>62371718
Are they going to stop printing money?

62372059
>>62372043
My boomer father, who invested a big chunk of his portfolio in btc a couple years ago near its low, is now exiting. I think that's as good a sign as any that it's over for bitcope

62372126
>>62371733
Neither is the internet, yet here we are.

62372189
>>62371718
Unwavering belief that BTC is how WAGMI.

62372279
It's like a runescape party hat without the duplication glitch.

62372380
>>62371718
BTC was created by kraken, coinbase and binance in 2017. Upon launch they confused their users into thinking this new asset was Bitcoin. They did this to convince miners to chase profit on a minority fork. Miners are understood to be the adopters, voters and stewards of the technology. Getting the majority hashrate onto the new fork was imperative. It worked flawlessly with miners abandoning Bitcoin to mine this new handicapped network called BTC. My conviction remains with Bitcoin, the only tech that can elevate humanity. BTC is not Bitcoin.

62372396
Its not, I bought and sold like 10 times

62372419
>>62371718
I'm a bagholder since 2018. I got some returns but I'm obviously not happy. Still much better than my Link bag which is a disaster. I always notice trends too late, being hyperliquid the latest one i missed. Still bought at 62 and will try to sell at 70+.
Unironically, hype seems the only crypto i have more faith atm even though I got like 4k riding.
My BTC bag is worth 200k atm. Sucks.
Also, i started diversifying into Nasdaq and sp500 i lost faith on BTC being he fastest vehicle and i think next bull run we'll be very lucky if we even reach 180k top. We probably get front runned at 140-150k. Still I'll be dropping heavily my bags then

62372448
>>62371718
Truly decentralised money

62372468
>>62372051
The problem with NFTs is how they have such a small market cap while being extremely illiquid on top of that. Any shitcoin ranked #320 on CoinGecko has a higher market cap than Pudgy Penguins, and 50x to 100x its trading volume. That’s an automatic turn-off for any whale that would want to invest millions in the top NFTs. These bags would be hard to sell at the right moment.

62372501
>>62372380
>mfw the real Bitcoin is only $226 today

62372915
>>62372501
>>mfw the real Bitcoin is only $226 today
lol!
bcash cucks BTFO
>we don't need POW, we will have 10-block "finalisation rule!!!"
wow, just as Satoshi intended! lamao.

62373544
>>62371807
Everyone has that plan until Bitcoin decides to never give them their entry back.

62373685
>>62372056
no, they're going to print more for the US and going to bail out the cash strapped holders of US bonds with swap lines

62374097
>>62371917
What's your entry price?

62374451
>>62372043
Depends what you're optimizing for. Some people want the next 100x. Others are happy finding ways to make their BTC a bit more productive without giving up exposure entirely.

62375554
>>62372051
Maybe, but doesn't the ETF route introduce a different trade-off?

62375717
Nice triple post faglord

62376610
>>62372056
No reason to stop printing

62376672
>>62376610

62369246

62369265
>>62369230

62369331
>>62369230

I missed discord meeting saar

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62369346
1XRP= 1M$
Kaboooom
Thanks Joel thanks braddy

62369352
>>62369230

62369371
$10,000 is fud. That's literally 5 ham sandwiches.

62370904
>>62369230
BOOOOOOOOOOOM

62373711
Everyone in this thread is the same link obsessive who lost the same argument for 10 months straight across 100 threads and is doing this to cope.

62373723
KABOOOOOOOOOOOOM
>>62373711
so fxcking bullish gish gallop

62375957
>>62373723
You might be the maddest person to ever invest.

62375980
>>62373723
>>62375957
I mean, like the most pathologically butthurt and angry with a meth user level of drive to emotionallly ejaculate just how mad you are in low IQ, really counterproductive ways that betray how poorly thought out your investment is. You literally formed your identity around a bad investment you made (link) to such an extent you feel like people calling it out are individually threatening you, and you chose the most jewy, least real utility having, most obvious scam coin possible 7 years after it was obvious they were building a software business fundraising and not even going to flesh out demand for the token beyond announcements that mean nothing to token holders but they know token holders will misunderstand and they can dump directly on them on the basis of.

62375988
>>62369230
>XRP CHART ANALYST

62375990
>no link, citation
>boom meme
just think, if you sold before new years, you would be almost twice as rich.
i hate XRP baggie retards so much.

62375996
>>62375980
BOOOOOOOOOM
When you put it that way I am so fucking bullish holy shit

62376000
so bullish XRP

62376014
>>62375990
so fxcking bxllish

62376051
>>62375996
zero idea what you think this type of messaging does or who you think you're successfully trolling. It just makes you look like a terminally angry faggot.

62376053
If you dont like XRP fuck you

so bullish

62376075
>>62376051

62376095
>>62376051
if you’re not bullish for xrp you can fuck right off, stupid linkie

62376181
>>62376095
i know it gives you psychic comfort to assume all anti-XRP posts are made by even dumber linkies, but the fact is i hold neither and think you are all incredibly retarded. good job enriching villainous shitcoin founders, i guess.

62376449
